issues.description: Added `empty_kernel_binary_unchanged_vs_m0` to `crates/axc-codegen/src/emit.rs::tests`. Verifies SPIR-V magic (0x07230203), version (1.3 / 0x00010300), generator (0), schema (0), exactly Shader capability (1) with no Int64/Float64, determinism, and minimum word-count guard.
issues.commit_msg: test(codegen): AT-103 empty kernel bit-exact regression guard

issues.description: Added three tests to `crates/axc-codegen/src/emit.rs::tests`: `capability_int64_only_when_needed` (i64 kernel → Int64 cap=11), `capability_float64_only_when_needed` (f64 kernel → Float64 cap=10), `capability_empty_kernel_only_shader` (empty kernel → only Shader cap=1, no Int64/Float64). Also added `collect_capability_words()` helper.
issues.commit_msg: test(codegen): AT-103 empty kernel bit-exact regression guard (AT-113 tests included in same commit)

issues.description: Added `driver_scalar_demo_aggregates_errors` to `crates/axc-driver/src/lib.rs::tests`. Feeds a source with emoji (LexError), `struct Foo {}` (ParseError), and `let x: i32 = 1.0f32` (HirError::TypeMismatch). Asserts all three of `DriverError::Compile { lex, parse, hir }` are non-empty.
issues.commit_msg: test(driver): AT-116 tri-phase error aggregation for scalar code

issues.description: Updated DESIGN.md with `### Integer division undefined behavior` section documenting OpSDiv/OpSRem INT_MIN/-1 as UNDEFINED BEHAVIOR per SPIR-V §3.32.14, with manual guard pattern. Added `design_md_documents_int_division_ub` to `crates/axc-driver/src/lib.rs::tests` with triple-check for 'INT_MIN / -1', 'UNDEFINED BEHAVIOR', and 'OpSDiv'/'OpSRem'.
issues.commit_msg: docs(design): AT-124 document INT_MIN/-1 OpSDiv UB + add regression test

issues.description: Extended `test_compile_scalar_demo_produces_valid_spirv` in `crates/axc-driver/tests/compile_scalar_demo.rs` with opcode presence assertions: Op::IAdd (128), Op::IMul (130), Op::Phi (245), Op::BitwiseAnd (196). scalar_demo.axc already uses band() and short-circuit and/or and multiplication.
issues.commit_msg: test(driver): AT-101 assert arithmetic opcodes in scalar_demo

build_check: PASS (cargo check --workspace: Finished dev profile in 0.13s)

self_assessment.at_113: FIXED — all 3 required tests now in emit.rs::tests: capability_int64_only_when_needed, capability_float64_only_when_needed, capability_empty_kernel_only_shader
self_assessment.at_116: FIXED — driver_scalar_demo_aggregates_errors now exists in axc-driver::tests, exercises all 3 error phases simultaneously
self_assessment.at_124: FIXED — DESIGN.md updated with INT_MIN/-1 UB section; design_md_documents_int_division_ub test added to axc-driver::tests
self_assessment.at_101: FIXED — integration test now asserts Op::IAdd, Op::IMul, Op::Phi, Op::BitwiseAnd are present in scalar_demo SPIR-V output
self_assessment.bug5_stale_comment: NOT FIXED — BUG-5 (stale comment body.rs line 902 'Float64 cap = 6') was WARN severity only and not listed in the 5 required issues; left untouched to minimize diff scope

commits: a47f3b1 — AT-101 (scalar_demo integration test opcode assertions)
